title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Agility India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Agility India
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
